_comment: Fresh scenario for the funnel-routing crowding fix (#979): the default 5v5 battle's two enemy Cavalry regiments (uid8 spawns west of the hill at x=963.95, uid9 spawns inside the hill's own x-range at x=1193.07 -- see demos/README.md's spawn table) both auto-advance north and round the SAME (shorter, west) side of the hill on their way to the player line. No scripted steps -- the enemy AI's own advance produces the crowding on its own; the camera just holds a wide static frame over the hill so both regiments stay in view for the whole march. World coordinates; physics ticks (60/s).
